name: Game RPG Narrative Writing Preset
description: Tabletop RPG campaign design with mechanics-driven narrative structure. Supports D&D 5e, PBTA, FATE, and Blades in the Dark.
author: Spec Kit Community

systems.name: D&D 5e
systems.description: Complete templates for 15-session D&D 5e campaigns with mechanics integration

systems.name: PBTA
systems.description: Powered by the Apocalypse mechanics patterns

systems.name: FATE

systems.name: Blades in the Dark
systems.description: Blades in the Dark faction and crew mechanics

features: Skill check system with DC scaling
Encounter CR scaling and XP awards
Seven ending paths with lock timing
Campaign theme support (8 themes for D&D 5e)
Export to Ink or SugarCube engines
